title: Greeting Card Second Nature Pop Up Santa and Sleigh Christmas Card, Multi, 17 x 12 x 0.5 cm
features: This unique 3D card jumps to life when removed from it's envelope
It is "driven" with an elastic band which "triggers" the Pop Up to instantly open when removed from it's envelope
The card can be easily closed by pinching the finger guides marked on either side
Gift Tag & small side panel available for a hand written personal message
The Pop Ups can be used for so much more, why not use them as part of a table arrangement to hold a balloon, or as part of a floral arrangement?
description: Not just any card, this award-winning Pop-Up Greeting Card jumps to life from its envelope! It is a wonderful personal gift to treasure and can be kept flat for mailing in its envelope or stored as a keepsake. This design has a blank panel and a gift tag that can be used for a personal message. Just close the Pop-Up flat and write your message in the panel/tag provided before placing it in the envelope for mailing. If you’re wondering how big it is, these are the dimensions: Closed size (approx.): 170 x 120mm (6¾'' x 4¾'') Open size (approx.): 210 x 250mm (8½ x 10'')
